serverInfo.name: kopern
serverInfo.title: Kopern — AI Agent Builder, Grader & Orchestrator
serverInfo.description: Full AI agent lifecycle via MCP: create agents, deploy from 37 templates, grade with test suites, optimize with AutoTune, orchestrate multi-agent teams and pipelines, deploy to Widget/Telegram/WhatsApp/Slack/Webhooks, connect email/calendar, monitor usage, export/import agents — 32 tools.

authentication.instructions: Create an API key at kopern.ai → Settings → Personal API Key (user-level, 30 platform tools) or Agent → MCP/API tab (agent-bound, adds chat + agent_info = 32 tools). Keys start with 'kpn_'. Pass via Authorization: Bearer kpn_...

tools.name: kopern_chat
tools.description: Send a message to an agent with tool calling (agent-bound key only).

tools.name: kopern_agent_info
tools.description: Get agent metadata (agent-bound key only).

tools.name: kopern_list_templates
tools.description: List all 37 agent templates (28 general + 9 vertical). No LLM cost.

tools.name: kopern_list_agents
tools.description: List all your agents. No LLM cost.

tools.name: kopern_grade_prompt
tools.description: Grade a system prompt against inline test cases. Uses your API keys.

tools.name: kopern_create_agent
tools.description: Create a new agent with system prompt, model, and optional skills.

tools.name: kopern_get_agent
tools.description: Get full agent details (prompt, model, counts).

tools.name: kopern_update_agent
tools.description: Update agent configuration.

tools.name: kopern_delete_agent
tools.description: Permanently delete an agent and all its data.

tools.name: kopern_deploy_template
tools.description: Deploy agent from a template with skills, tools, and grading suite.

tools.name: kopern_create_grading_suite
tools.description: Create a grading suite with test cases on an agent.

tools.name: kopern_run_grading
tools.description: Run grading suite, get detailed per-case scores. Uses your API keys.

tools.name: kopern_run_autoresearch
tools.description: AutoTune iterative prompt optimization. Uses your API keys.

tools.name: kopern_create_team
tools.description: Create a multi-agent team (parallel, sequential, or conditional).

tools.name: kopern_run_team
tools.description: Execute a team on a prompt. Uses your API keys.

tools.name: kopern_connect_widget
tools.description: Enable embeddable chat widget. Returns embed code.

tools.name: kopern_connect_telegram
tools.description: Connect agent to Telegram bot.

tools.name: kopern_connect_whatsapp
tools.description: Connect agent to WhatsApp Business.

tools.name: kopern_connect_slack
tools.description: Get Slack OAuth install URL.

tools.name: kopern_connect_webhook
tools.description: Create inbound/outbound webhook (n8n, Zapier, Make).

tools.name: kopern_create_pipeline
tools.description: Create a multi-step pipeline with input mapping.

tools.name: kopern_run_pipeline
tools.description: Execute a pipeline sequentially. Uses your API keys.

tools.name: kopern_list_sessions
tools.description: List conversation sessions with metrics.

tools.name: kopern_get_session
tools.description: Full session detail (events, tool calls, tokens).

tools.name: kopern_manage_memory
tools.description: Agent memory CRUD (remember, recall, forget, list).

tools.name: kopern_compliance_report
tools.description: EU AI Act compliance report (Art. 6, 12, 14, 52).

tools.name: kopern_get_grading_results
tools.description: Detailed results of a grading run.

tools.name: kopern_list_grading_runs
tools.description: Score history for a grading suite.

tools.name: kopern_connect_email
tools.description: Connect Gmail/Outlook via OAuth. Enables email tools.

tools.name: kopern_connect_calendar
tools.description: Connect Google/Microsoft Calendar via OAuth. Enables scheduling tools.

tools.name: kopern_get_usage
tools.description: Token usage, cost, per-agent breakdown.

tools.name: kopern_export_agent
tools.description: Export agent as portable JSON (config, skills, tools, grading).

tools.name: kopern_import_agent
tools.description: Import agent from Kopern export JSON.
